title: Multi Select for Connect Board column
excerpt: Utilizing Connect Boards column have to click each individual item - can we get a select all option? Or the ability to click top item box, hold down shift and click last?

posts.author: csanders1214 (Chelsea Sanders)
posts.cookedHtml: Utilizing Connect Boards column have to click each individual item - can we get a select all option? Or the ability to click top item box, hold down shift and click last?

posts.author: amber (Amber from monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @csanders1214

Amber here from the Boards team at monday.com

Could you please tell me more about your use case here?

Let’s say Board A is where you are setting up the connection (looking to connect it to multiple items on Board B).

What do your items on Board A and Board B represent?
Does it make sense to go to Board B rather and batch action select all the relevant items and select the connection to the Board A item.

Feel free to share as much information to help me understand your workflow to better understand why this might be important functionality for you!
